creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
At Thu, 20 Sep 2001 13:42:06 +0400,
skv@protey.ru wrote:
> Update port: Sablot-0.70 (new version)
(snip)
> -lib/libsablot.so.65
> +lib/libsablot.so.70

I think this library bumps the major version too aggressively.  Does
it really keep getting incompatible with previous versions?

I suggest you patch the Makefile to give it a proper major version so
we do not need to fix all the depenent ports every time we update the
Sablotron port.
